title: Flat Idler Pulley, Lawn Mower Accessories, Idler Pulley Replacement Compatible with Husqvarna 539103257, 12473 Series
features: Durable Material: The idler pulley features a metal wheel body, offering robust resistance to impacts and deformation, enabling it to withstand complex terrains and high-frequency vibrations effectively

Stable Power Transmission: Engineered to support the mower blade drive belt or chain, the idler pulley ensures a consistent and stable power transmission route, minimizing deflection or jitter during operation
Brand Compatibility: The idler pulley is designed to be compatible with Husqvarna models, including 539103257 and the 12473 series, ensuring seamless integration with these specific brands

Effortless Setup: With its user-friendly design, the idler pulley is easy to install, making it suitable for both domestic and commercial lawn mowers, as well as lawn trimmers and garden maintenance equipment

Versatile Application: The idler pulley's adaptability extends to a wide range of lawn and garden machinery, providing reliable performance across various types of equipment used in both residential and professional settings
description: Specification: Name: Idler Pulley Material: Metal Size: As shown Package Included: 1 * Idler Pulley
